name: Farmer
description: Stardew Valley is your favorite game, don't wait, start now...

tasks.name: Farming Diamona Flowers
tasks.description: Travel around, find a diamona flower (with shears) and then plant it on farmland and wait for it to spread...

tasks.name: Harvesting Hell Flowers
tasks.description: Travel around in the Nether, and again gather 5 Hell Flowers...

tasks.name: Farming Oxonium Carrots
tasks.description: You can find them inside custom villages crops or by crafting them but you will have to harvest them
